visual_description: A long, dark stone corridor with arched ceilings and pillars is shown. A figure in dark clothing runs down the corridor, pursued by a large, dark, amorphous creature. The creature lunges forward, causing a massive explosion of dust and debris that fills the screen and obscures the view.
audio_description: A loud, booming explosion sound occurs, followed by the sound of crumbling stone and debris falling.
